snippet.title: ‘Guardians Vol. 3’: Chris Pratt on Dropping First F-Bomb in the MCU! (Exclusive)
snippet.description: Chris Pratt chatted with “Extra’s” Rachel Lindsay at the L.A. premiere of “Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3,” which marks the end of the road for Marvel’s band of interstellar heroes! He reflected on how the role has changed his life and dished on getting to drop the first f-bomb in the MCU! Chris also spoke about his upcoming anniversary with wife Katherine Schwarzenegger and taking time some down time to be with his family. “Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3” is in theaters May 5.

localized.title: ‘Guardians Vol. 3’: Chris Pratt on Dropping First F-Bomb in the MCU! (Exclusive)
localized.description: Chris Pratt chatted with “Extra’s” Rachel Lindsay at the L.A. premiere of “Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3,” which marks the end of the road for Marvel’s band of interstellar heroes! He reflected on how the role has changed his life and dished on getting to drop the first f-bomb in the MCU! Chris also spoke about his upcoming anniversary with wife Katherine Schwarzenegger and taking time some down time to be with his family. “Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3” is in theaters May 5.

snippet.title: THE LAST OF US, CRITICS CHOICE AWARDS HANGOVER, SLAMDANCE FILMMAKERS | Hollywood on the Rocks!
snippet.description:
Today, they review...
8:40 The Last of Us

Then, Chris and Alan discuss...
57:02 Critics Choice Awards Hangover

Then, they interview...
1:27:40 Slamdance Filmmakers including:

“Silent Love”  (US Premiere, Feature Documentary Competition Section) Director, Writer & Cinematographer Marek Kozakiewicz (“Pozegnanie," “The Captive”)

“With Peter Bradley” (World Premiere, Feature Documentary Competition Section) Director, Cinematographer, Editor & Producer Alex Rappoport (“Larry Kramer in Love And Anger,” “In The Shadow of The Towers: Stuyvesant Hugh on 9/11”),

“Starring Jerry as Himself” (World Premiere, Feature Documentary Competition Section) Director & Editor Lawrence Chen (“We Humans,” “I Don’t Make The Rules”) & Producer & Co-Star (son of Jerry): Jonathan Hsu (“Leftovers,” “The Lion of Chinatown”)

“The Underbug” (World Premiere, Narrative Feature Breakout Section) Director & Co-Writer Shujaat Saudagar (“Jaadugar,” “Gulmohar”)

Have a drink with us on Film Threat’s Hollywood On the Rocks every Wednesday at 1pm PST for film reviews, interviews and a chance to join the conversation about movies and all things pop culture!

𝐍𝐓𝐑𝐎𝐃𝐔𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 📖.

Welcome to my gaming channel! I’m passionate about sharing my love of gaming with others and creating entertaining content for viewers to enjoy.

Here you’ll find a variety of gaming videos, ranging from let’s plays to walkthroughs to game reviews. I love to explore different genres and platforms, so you can expect to see a diverse range of games on my channel.

I pride myself on creating high-quality content that’s both entertaining and informative. Whether you’re a seasoned gamer or just starting out, my videos are designed to be accessible and enjoyable for all.

snippet.title: I am the pro in Profoto with Jeremy Cowart
snippet.description:
Photographer, artist and creative explorer Jeremy Cowart paints every scene using light. Reinventing and embodying the impossible, discovering something new with each blank canvas at every shoot and using light as his brush to paint his subjects – turning people into a work of art.

Discover his unique lighting style 📸

Share the Light ➤ https://profoto.com/sharethelight/jeremycowart
Photographer's portrait ➤ https://profoto.com/profoto-stories/jeremy-cowart
10,000 NFT's in 20 minutes ➤ https://cowart.io/auras
Video by @evolvestudios

snippet.title: Safiya Sinclair | How to Say Babylon: A Memoir
snippet.description:
Because you love Author Events, please make a donation to keep this series available to everyone: https://support.freelibrary.org/site/Donation2?df_id=1860&mfc_pref=T&1860.donation=form1

In conversation with Philadelphia Poet Laureate Airea D Matthews

Hailed by Tara Westover as “Dazzling. Potent Vital. A light shining on the path of self-deliverance,” Safiya Sinclair’s memoir How to Say Babylon recounts her struggle to break free from her rigid Rastafarian upbringing and her father’s repressive control, set against the backdrop of a larger story of colonialism in Jamaica. Sinclair is also the author of the acclaimed poetry collection Cannibal, winner of a Whiting Writers’ Award, the American Academy of Arts and Letters’ Metcalf Award in Literature, and the Prairie Schooner Book Prize in Poetry, among other honors. The recipient of a Pushcart Prize and fellowships from the Poetry Foundation, MacDowell, Yaddo, and the Bread Loaf Writers’ Conference, she teaches creative writing at the University of Arizona. Her writing has appeared in The New Yorker, Granta, The Nation, and Kenyon Review.

Airea D. Matthews is the 2022–23 Philadelphia Poet Laureate and directs the poetry program at Bryn Mawr College. Her collection Simulacra won the 2016 Yale Series of Younger Poets Prize and her work has appeared in The New York Times, Best American Poets, Gulf Coast, Harvard Review, and VQR, among other journals. Matthews’ other honors include a 2022 Academy of American Poets Laureate Fellowship, a 2020 Pew Fellowship, and the 2016 Rona Jaffe Foundation Writers’ Award. Addressing themes of income inequality, commodification, and conventional economic theories, Bread and Circus combines poetry, prose, and imagery to tell an intimate story about the author and her family.

Recorded October 5, 2023

Facebook: https://facebook.com/authorevents
Instagram: https://instagram.com/flpauthorevents
Twitter: https://twitter.com/authorevents
Podcast Archive: https://libwww.freelibrary.org/programs/authorevents/podcast

The views expressed by the authors and moderators are strictly their own and do not represent the opinions of the Free Library of Philadelphia or its employees.

snippet.title: Goal Implementation: How to Actually Accomplish Your Goals
snippet.description:
Are you struggling to achieve your goals? 

 In this episode, I'm going to share with you my top tips for goal implementation. Goal setting is great, but if you don't have a plan for how to actually accomplish your goals, then you're not going to get very far. So make sure to listen to this episode and put these tips into action!

 Every Tuesday, Tiffany answers one of your submitted questions. To submit a question for an upcoming episode, visit here: https://www.moneytalkwitht.com/asktiffany

Connect with Tiffany on Social Media 
Facebook: Money Talk With Tiff
Twitter: @moneytalkwitht
Instagram: @moneytalkwitht
LinkedIn: Tiffany Grant

localized.title: Goal Implementation: How to Actually Accomplish Your Goals
localized.description:
Are you struggling to achieve your goals? 

 In this episode, I'm going to share with you my top tips for goal implementation. Goal setting is great, but if you don't have a plan for how to actually accomplish your goals, then you're not going to get very far. So make sure to listen to this episode and put these tips into action!

 Every Tuesday, Tiffany answers one of your submitted questions. To submit a question for an upcoming episode, visit here: https://www.moneytalkwitht.com/asktiffany

Connect with Tiffany on Social Media 
Facebook: Money Talk With Tiff
Twitter: @moneytalkwitht
Instagram: @moneytalkwitht
LinkedIn: Tiffany Grant
